input.task: Write a single SQLite query that returns how many runs have status 'finished'.
input.context: Run-history DB at .smithers/state/fixture-runs.db (relative to repo root). Tables: runs(run_id, workflow, status, model, created_at, finished_at, token_cost); events(id, run_id, seq, type, node_id, ts); node_outputs(run_id, node_id, schema_name, payload); scores(run_id, node_id, scorer, score).
